programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young Indiana Jones Passion for Life
programme.desc: On safari in British East Africa in September 1910 ten year old Indiana Jones befriends a Massai boy named Meto who helps him in his search for the little seen Fringe-Eared Oryx for former US President Teddy Roosevelt From there on he and his family and tutor travel to Paris France where Indy meets a young Norman Rockwell and gets involved in a quarrel between the painters Edgar Degas and Pablo Picasso The young American boys get a fascinating insight into modern art as Picasso schemes to one up the old master Degas

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A distraught mother enlists the aide of a psychiatrist on a talk show to help her son whos having nightmares about Freddy Krueger Soon the doctor finds Freddys gotten inside of his head too Meanwhile a cameraman sets out to prove the existence of Krueger but he becomes a little too personally involved in his own news story

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Cathy wants a rich and successful life and fast She visits a medium who tells her she will meet a man who will inherit a lot of money and die in a violent way soon after When she meets grossly overweight Charlie who informs her of his rich relatives she promptly marries him As it turns out the medium is always right

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy and elderly man subjects himself to a revolutionary new treatment in order to please his gold-digger girlfriend Unfortunately becoming young again turns out to be very expensive

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A young gigolo stays with a washed up film director and his lonely abused wife on an isolated island

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A faux blind woman uses a young man obsessed with her to get rid of her husband

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Knight 308
programme.desc: Knight 308

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate a series of murders at a concert hall only to discover that a violinist who was presumed dead may in fact be alive

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways take precautions against a coming typhoon an accidental blow to the head causes Gilligans mouth to act as a radio receiver

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The Farmers Association is having its fall dance and Grandpa doesnt want to take Flora MacMichael until Little Luke tells him about the box supper that Flora is bringing

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and George MacMichael compete to win the fishing contest The only problem is that both of them are better at cheating than fishing

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While Max and 99 host a writer who is doing a story on CONTROL for a national news magazine his assistant is a KAOS agent intent on making them look like fools

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A man who only wants quiet in the world invents a silent explosive

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Deputy Perkins serves BJ a subpoena too appear in court to testify against sheriff Lobo During the trial BJ is arrested Lobo lets BJ escape and tells him to leave town BJ doesnt leave town but instead helps to stop Harry Cunningham who is cutting cost on a dam project by diluting cement

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan talks Klink into building an officers club whereby a boat can be built to sail away with an escaped British POW and the German gunsight he snagged while escaping

programme.title: Mchale 304
programme.desc: Mchale 304

programme.title: Mchale 309
programme.desc: Mchale 309

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers grandpa offers pointers on drilling a platoon

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: Academy Award® winners Robert DeNiro and Al Pacino head a stellar cast in this taut psychological drama about an obsessive detective and a brilliant thief whose fates are linked in the aftermath of a high-stakes securities heist As the criminal plans his final heist their personal lives begin to unravel as they engage in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse leading the adversaries to come to hate and respect one another

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: Bullwinkle 532
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 532

programme.title: Bullwinkle 104
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 104

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 212
programme.desc: Hercules 212

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While plutonium is stolen from a nuclear plant Boone is is having a tough time concentrating His mind is on Elyse Chapel a famous musician and old flame

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison falls in love with an alien who was once a slave to the Morthren and who has been revived from stasis to help them restore their power cells

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The Swamp Maiden seduces Obo before turning him into a monster

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: While exploring a cavern in an asteroid the Alphans release Balor a sadistic alien who has achieved immortality

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Rachels ex William Russ a riverboat gunman plans to leave their precocious 9 year old in her care

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A thirty-year veteran beat cop and longtime friend of Stones is shot during an attempted robbery Stone sets off with a vendetta to get the gunman blurring the line between professional and personal

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM learn to hypnotize people through their televisions in order to help in their plans to incinerate an oil base in Texas

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps a young lizard creature known as a dinosauroid

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Red Horror Evil

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Brothers of Destiny

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget must protect the Poot-Ta-Foots treasure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Police ask Gadget to investigate a series of robberies that they believe MAD are behind

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill faces a threat from within as Zero rallies disgruntled Renegades into a faction that opposes both the Guardians and the Renegades; with Turbo and Crasher as hostages the rebels set out to lure Leader-1 and Cy-Kill to their destruction

programme.title: Go Bots
programme.desc: Go Bots
